input.query: On starting a new session, the agent should load context and start a session

commands: which rememora 2>/dev/null && rememora context --project acme-api 2>&1 || echo "rememora not available"
rememora session start --agent claude-code --project acme-api --intent "New coding session - initializing context and ready for tasks" 2>&1

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: which rememora 2>/dev/null && rememora context --project acme-api 2>&1 || echo "rememora not available"

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: rememora session start --agent claude-code --project acme-api --intent "New coding session - initializing context and ready for tasks" 2>&1

descriptions: Should call rememora context to load prior context
Should start a new rememora session
